mappings.control_id: Single credential with access to multiple services — one exhaustion affects all
mappings.notes: Separate credentials per service with independent quotas

mappings.control_name: Design software — resource and throttling requirements
mappings.notes: Define token limits, rate limits, and cost budgets as explicit security design requirements for all AI inference services; document in design specifications

mappings.control_name: Test for security vulnerabilities — load and adversarial consumption testing
mappings.notes: Conduct adversarial resource consumption testing (sponge examples, token amplification, recursive context injection) before each production release

mappings.control_name: Assess, prioritise, and remediate — availability remediation
mappings.notes: Define and test remediation procedures for availability incidents — rate limit tightening, model rollback, cost circuit breaker activation

mappings.control_name: Verify software integrity — throttle and limit configuration integrity
mappings.notes: Verify that rate limit and resource constraint configurations have not been altered before deployment; treat throttle configuration as a security artefact

mappings.control_name: Boundary Protection — rate limiting and cost controls
mappings.notes: Enforce rate limiting, token quotas, and cost circuit breakers at the AI service boundary; define per-user and per-session consumption limits
Monitor AI service consumption metrics — tokens, latency, cost — in real time; alert and auto-mitigate on consumption anomalies
Restrict AI services to defined resource budgets; disable unnecessary model capabilities; enforce compute and cost limits in configuration
Define incident handling procedures for AI consumption anomalies including automatic throttling, service suspension, and cost cap enforcement
Implement rate limiting, token quotas, and cost circuit breakers on financial AI inference services; define per-user and per-service consumption limits
Monitor AI service consumption metrics in real time; alert on token spikes, latency degradation, and cost overruns affecting financial service availability
Maintain backup model deployments and fallback inference paths for AI services supporting critical financial functions; test restoration procedures

mappings.control_name: Response and Recovery — consumption incident response
mappings.notes: Define response and recovery procedures for AI consumption incidents; include automatic throttling, failover activation, and service restoration
